task: TOEFL 2026 Expansion Window A — complete_the_words draft sets
scopeNote: Plan specified exactly 40 new sets (DB target 50). Mid-run the user changed the target to 60 NEW sets (DB target 70). The first 40 were authored, applied, and verified; then a 20-set delta was authored and the source consolidated to a single 60-set file. Distribution scaled editorially to per-domain 8/8/8/8/7/7/7/7 and difficulty intent 18 B1 / 24 B2 / 18 C1. A subsequent Codex review required a one-record science fix (see codexRemediation); final count remains complete_the_words = 70 (no deletion for symmetry).
startingGitStatus: clean (empty git status --short at window start)

distributionCompanionMetadata.note: Domain label and difficulty are DECLARED companion metadata / difficulty INTENT only — not a machine verification of the passages' real linguistic difficulty.

targetAndMaskStats.frameCapNote: Plan §12 cap is at most 8 of 40 (scaled headroom at 60). 0 of the explicit 'is called X'/'known as X' frames; one mild appositive ('this same force, called friction') is well within the cap.

codexRemediation.trigger: Codex review: record 'vibration' had a scientifically wrong statement ('the speed of each vibration decides how high the note sounds'). Pitch depends on vibration frequency/rate, not speed.
codexRemediation.fix: Rewrote the passage to: '... how high the note sounds depends not on how far the string moves but on how many times per second it completes a vibration; more cycles each second produce a higher note.' targetWord=vibration and maskedForm='vibr_____' kept; context still uniquely recovers the word; explain_zh updated to cite frequency/cycles (not speed) and the visible-letter pattern.

legacyIdHandling.deletionMethod: Targeted delete keyed on the OLD legacy_id only. Pre-delete assertions: task_type='complete_the_words', status='draft', qa_flags.template='toefl-complete-the-words', qa_flags.stage='adhoc', exactly 1 item (input_mode='spell', draft), stimulus legacy_id matched. Deleted by precise IDs: item (by question_set_id) -> set (by id) -> stimulus (by id). No broad task_type deletion was used.

codexRemediation.verifierCommentsFixed: All stale '40' comments in verify-toefl-complete-words-expansion.ts updated to 60 (except one provenance line documenting the 40->60 scaling). Difficulty/domain explicitly labelled companion metadata / difficulty intent, not machine-verified text difficulty.

applyCounts.note: -40.json was consolidated into -60.json and retired. The vibration fix changed one record's content (new legacy_id), so its old draft set/item/stimulus were deleted by precise IDs first; re-apply wrote only the new record (1) and dup-skipped the 59 unchanged.

dbState.totalSetsNote: totalSets reflects the SHARED Supabase DB during the parallel run; it rose beyond this window's 4878+60 because Window B (qbank/toefl-writing) writes its own draft sets to the same DB. This window's net contribution is exactly +60 complete_the_words (the vibration replace is net 0). gen active=0 and deprecated=0 still hold globally.

manualReviewMethod.authoring: 8 academic domains authored in parallel by Claude (Opus) subagents — no DeepSeek, no external generation API, no scraping of real test items.
manualReviewMethod.mechanicalGate: Per-record JS gate mirroring lib/exam-task-templates/shape.ts complete_words branch: target is a plain lowercase lexical word len>=6, maskedForm length match, case-exact shown letters, hidden>=2 and >=30% and not all, exactly one whole-word occurrence in passage, passage 15-55 words, explain_zh present and references the target.
manualReviewMethod.adversarialVerify: Each candidate independently re-checked by an Opus skeptic that reconstructs the word from the masked passage WITHOUT seeing the answer and rejects same-length ambiguous alternatives or non-recoverable / non-ordinary words.
manualReviewMethod.loopAndDedup: Loop-to-quota per domain with difficulty-slot filling; global de-duplication vs pilot 10, existing 40, and each other; definitional-frame cap fixup.
manualReviewMethod.controllerReview: All 60 maskedForms verified letter-by-letter; single-occurrence and uniqueness re-checked; stage verifier run in source-only and DB modes. Codex-flagged vibration record corrected and re-verified.

replacedOrRejectedDrafts: In-loop rejections (none imported): mostly occ_0 inflection mismatches auto-corrected (e.g. predator->predators, evaporates->evaporate, settlement/satellite variants); adversarial ambiguity/recoverability rejections; >=3 global-duplicate drops in batch 1 (nutrients, resistance, sediment) plus delta-stage dups. Post-hoc Codex remediation: 1 record (vibration) replaced for scientific accuracy via targeted delete + re-apply.

validationCommands.result: activeTotal 0, antonym 0, cet_cloze 0, totalSets 5038 (shared with Window B)

filesLeftForCentralIntegration: scripts/verify-toefl-pilot.ts — NOT modified; still encodes the pre-integration 10-set complete_the_words baseline. Central integration should update it to the post-merge 70-set pool after both windows land.
reports/qbank-production-final-summary.md, reports/qbank-production-issue-ledger.*, reports/toefl-2026-non-audio-* — intentionally NOT touched (central integration owns them).
Shared auto-generated validation/import reports — reverted in this branch; central integration regenerates and reconciles with Window B.
recommendation: Ready for central Codex integration review. The vibration science error is fixed and re-verified; complete_the_words = 70 (10 pilot + 60 new), all draft, no activation. Validate the 70-set pool alongside Window B, then update the canonical verify-toefl-pilot.ts baseline and production final-summary centrally.
